TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Al Brightman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 9, Al Brightman, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1992) pinqbaqan nya Al Brightman mqwas biru sa Wilson Classical pqwsan biru seneng, Long Beach, California, U.S. Al Brightman mqwas biru sa California State pqwsan biru krahu . Al Brightman, t'aring kawas tay 1945 tehuk kawas tay 1946, mqwas biru sa Charleston pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Al Brightman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. maki sa kawas 1946, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: al βriɣħtman s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, al βriɣħtman, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) pinqβaqan nja al βriɣħtman mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa wils~ɕon ʦ~ʨlas~ɕs~ɕiʦ~ʨal pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ, loŋ βeaʦ~ʨħ, ʦ~ʨali*ornia, u.s~ɕ. al βriɣħtman mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ʦ~ʨali*ornia s~ɕtate pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu . al βriɣħtman, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ʦ~ʨħarles~ɕton pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. mintzjuwaw nja al βriɣħtman s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nβa. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Al Brightman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 9, Al Brightman, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1992) pinqbaqan nya Al Brightman mqwas biru sa Wilson Classical pqwsan biru seneng, Long Beach, California, U.S. Al Brightman mqwas biru sa California State pqwsan biru krahu . Al Brightman, t'aring kawas tay 1945 tehuk kawas tay 1946, mqwas biru sa Charleston pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Al Brightman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. maki sa kawas 1946, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: al βriɣħtman s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, al βriɣħtman, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) pinqβaqan nja al βriɣħtman mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa wils~ɕon ʦ~ʨlas~ɕs~ɕiʦ~ʨal pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ, loŋ βeaʦ~ʨħ, ʦ~ʨali*ornia, u.s~ɕ. al βriɣħtman mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ʦ~ʨali*ornia s~ɕtate pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu . al βriɣħtman, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ʦ~ʨħarles~ɕton pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. mintzjuwaw nja al βriɣħtman s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nβa. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
